steps.title: Identify what the passage emphasizes about songs
steps.content: The passage highlights that some expressions in indigenous languages appear only in songs, yet current preservation efforts focus exclusively on spoken language. This discrepancy is what must be addressed.

steps.title: Select the action that resolves it
steps.content: Choice D states they must incorporate songs into their preservation efforts. The other choices either contradict the premise (A wrongly claims songs use spoken phrases), narrow the claim unnecessarily (B restricts to ecological knowledge), or propose the wrong action (C suggests analyzing rather than preserving). That matches choice D — D is correct.
